data.title: NAT is now available on SpiderPool, supporting dual mining of Bitcoin on the same block.
data.description: NAT has launched on SpiderPool, the fifth largest mining pool, supporting dual mining of Bitcoin and DMT-NAT on the same block. DMT-NAT (NAT) is a native Bitcoin asset based on the theory of digital matter, sharing the same computing power, public chain, block, and address as BTC, and is produced synchronously with each block every 10 minutes. Currently, NAT produces approximately 386 million coins per block, with a value of approximately 38 USDT, corresponding to a total market capitalization of approximately $38 million. Block rewards will gradually decrease with increasing difficulty and block height. The code is completely open source, ensuring a fair and transparent mechanism. As NAT's market capitalization continues to grow, it will gradually help miners reduce mining costs: at a market capitalization of approximately $50 billion, the block reward will reach $50,000, covering some of the miners' costs; at a block reward of $500,000, it can effectively address Bitcoin's security budget issues. The aim is to ultimately create a virtuous cycle of NAT appreciation, increased miner revenue, increased computing power, and rising BTC prices.

data.title: ZETA Experiences Significant Intraday Surge
data.description: ZETA has seen a notable increase in its value, briefly surpassing $0.65 before settling at $0.64, marking an intraday rise of over 25%. According to Odaily, contract data reveals that ZETA's open interest has grown by 25.3%, with the current open interest amounting to approximately $2.1 million, representing about 2.6% of its market capitalization.

data.title: AI Sector Leads Gains in Crypto Market
data.description:
On April 17, the cryptocurrency market experienced widespread gains, with the AI sector showing significant growth. According to Odaily, the AI sector rose by 12.48% over 24 hours, with Siren (SIREN) surging 92.70% and SkyAI (SKYAI) increasing by 32.37%. Meanwhile, Bitcoin (BTC) saw a slight decline of 0.14%, hovering around $74,000, and Ethereum (ETH) fell by 1.12%, remaining above $2,300.

In other sectors, the Meme sector rose by 12.03%, with ORDI (ORDI) jumping 153.69%. The Layer2 sector increased by 5.36%, led by Celestia (TIA) with a 22.55% rise. The Layer1 sector climbed 2.91%, with Polkadot (DOT) up 11.33%. The DeFi sector saw a 2.82% increase, with Ethena (ENA) gaining 11.36%. The PayFi sector rose by 2.80%, with Safe (SAFE) up 15.49%, and the CeFi sector increased by 1.39%, with FTX (FTT) rising 5.43%.

Indices reflecting historical trends in these sectors showed that the ssiMeme, ssiLayer2, and ssiNFT indices rose by 7.74%, 4.91%, and 4.57%, respectively.

data.title: StoneX Analyst Predicts Short-Term Rise in U.S. Dollar Index
data.description: StoneX analyst Matt Simpson has indicated that the U.S. Dollar Index may experience a slight increase in the short term, based on technical analysis. According to ChainCatcher, the index is currently hovering around the 98.249 level. On Thursday, the 200-day simple moving average formed a 'slightly bullish' pattern, and the two-day relative strength index is in an extremely oversold state. However, several resistance levels remain, including the 200-day exponential moving average at 98.44, which bulls need to test.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Gold's Implied Volatility Declines Amid Rising Oil Prices
data.description: Gold's implied volatility has continued to decrease, raising attention to developments over the weekend. According to Jin10, despite growing optimism for extending the temporary ceasefire, oil prices are gradually climbing. Analysts caution that if efforts to ease tensions fail, it could prolong bearish pressure on international gold prices.

data.title: Cryptocurrency sectors generally rose, with the AI ​​sector leading the gains at over 12%.
data.description: On April 17th, according to SoSoValue data, the cryptocurrency market generally rose, with the AI ​​sector performing particularly well, up 12.48% in the last 24 hours. Specifically, Siren (SIREN) rose 92.70%, and SkyAI (SKYAI) rose 32.37%. Meanwhile, Bitcoin (BTC) fell 0.14%, remaining around $74,000; Ethereum (ETH) fell 1.12%, dropping below $2,300. In other sectors, the Meme sector rose 12.03% in the last 24 hours, with ORDI (ORDI) up 153.69%; the Layer 2 sector rose 5.36%, with Celestia (TIA) up 22.55%; the Layer 1 sector rose 2.91%, with Polkadot (DOT) up 11.33%; the DeFi sector rose 2.82%, with Ethena (ENA) up 11.36%; the PayFi sector rose 2.80%, with Safe (SAFE) up 15.49%; and the CeFi sector rose 1.39%, with FTX (FTT) up 5.43%. Crypto sector indices reflecting historical sector performance show that the ssiMeme, ssiLayer2, and ssiNFT indices rose 7.74%, 4.91%, and 4.57%, respectively.

data.title: Japan's Central Bank Faces Challenges Amid Rising Energy Prices
data.description:
Japan's central bank governor, Kazuo Ueda, addressed the media in Washington on April 17 following the G20 finance ministers and central bank governors meeting. According to BlockBeats, Ueda highlighted the significant impact of rising energy prices, which pose both inflationary and economic downturn risks.

Ueda emphasized the challenges policymakers face in addressing the inflationary pressures and economic risks stemming from Middle East conflicts. Ahead of the policy decision announcement later this month, he refrained from providing clear signals on interest rates.

"This is why policy response is very difficult. It's not easy to give a general answer," Ueda stated, noting that this might be his last opportunity to signal to the market before the April 28 interest rate decision. The upcoming meeting will not only decide the benchmark interest rate but also release the latest economic forecasts, which are expected to raise inflation projections while potentially lowering growth forecasts.

"Overall, considering the duration of the shock and other economic conditions, we will ultimately choose the most appropriate measures to achieve a sustained 2% inflation target," Ueda told reporters. "However, if I may add, even looking at the medium-term range, real interest rates in Japan remain very low," he added. "In this sense, the financial environment is highly accommodative. Keeping this in mind, we hope to continue making various decisions."

data.title: BRC-20 tokens surged, with MUBI rising 398.9% in the last 24 hours and SATS rising 60.8% in the last 24 hours.
data.description: According to Coingecko data, several tokens in the BRC-20 sector are still rising. The sector's market capitalization currently exceeds $237 million, with a 24-hour increase of 135.2% and a 24-hour trading volume of nearly $1.6 billion. Specifically: MUBI is currently at $0.001429, up 398.9% in 24 hours; ORDI is currently at $9.15, up 144.7% in 24 hours; SATS is currently at $0.00000002266, up 60.8% in 24 hours; TURT is currently at $0.0002204, up 36.6% in 24 hours; and 1000SATS is currently at $0.00002215, up 59.8% in 24 hours.

data.title: SpiderPool Introduces Dual-Layer Reward System in Bitcoin Mining
data.description:
SpiderPool, the world's fifth-largest Bitcoin mining pool, has implemented a Bitcoin block NAT distribution system, marking a significant step towards a dual-layer reward mechanism. According to Foresight News, the DMT-NAT, or NAT, is a Bitcoin native chain coin based on digital material theory. It shares the same computing power, public chain, block, and address as BTC, and is produced every ten minutes alongside the block, making it a co-originating companion coin.

Each block generates approximately 386 million NAT, with a total market value of around $38 million. The block rewards decrease gradually based on computing power difficulty and block height, with the code being fully open-source. Once the reward per block reaches $50,000, with a market value of $50 billion, it could cover part of the miners' costs, injecting new momentum into Bitcoin.

data.title: Australia Faces New Challenges Amid Fuel Crisis Triggered by Iranian Conflict
data.description: Australia is grappling with renewed difficulties in managing a fuel crisis sparked by the ongoing conflict involving Iran. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that the situation has intensified just as governmental interventions were starting to alleviate shortages and reduce gasoline prices. The crisis has put additional pressure on Australia's energy sector, which was beginning to see some relief from previous measures aimed at stabilizing supply and cost. The Iranian war's impact on global oil markets continues to pose significant challenges for countries reliant on imports, with Australia being particularly affected. Efforts to mitigate the crisis are ongoing, as authorities seek to balance domestic needs with international market dynamics.

data.title: AI TRENDS | ZetaChain Integrates Anthropic's Claude Opus 4.7 into Anuma Platform
data.description: ZetaChain has announced the integration of Anthropic's Claude Opus 4.7 into its proprietary AI layer on the Anuma platform, as of April 17. According to NS3.AI, this addition is part of ZetaChain 2.0, allowing users to access the model without requiring a separate installation. This development aims to enhance the platform's capabilities by leveraging advanced AI technology.

data.title: Pumpcade raises $5 million in seed funding, with Jump Crypto and others participating.
data.description: Pumpcade, a live streaming prediction market and meme token issuance platform, announced the completion of a $5 million seed funding round, with participation from Jump Crypto and Foundation Capital. Pumpcade, built on Solana, allows users to create prediction markets with a single click in live streaming scenarios and is integrated into the Pump.fun chat system. Pump.fun had previously participated in Pumpcade's $1 million pre-seed funding round.

data.title: BELIEF's market capitalization surpasses $13 million, up over 400% in a single day.
data.description: According to GMGN data, the market capitalization of BELIEF, the Meme coin of the SOL ecosystem, has surpassed $13 million, currently trading at $13.02 million, representing a daily increase of over 400%. Odaily reminds users that the price of Meme coins is highly volatile, and investors should be aware of the risks.

data.title: A massive ETH ICO whale has transferred 2,000 ETH to a multisignature address, which may be for sale.
data.description: According to crypto analyst Ai (@ai_9684xtpa), an "ETH ICO whale" with 1 million ETH transferred 2,000 ETH, worth approximately $4.63 million, to a multi-signature address 8 hours ago. On-chain data shows that this receiving address has a history of repeatedly transferring ETH to OKX after receiving it, suggesting it's a frequently used outflow path. The address from which this fund was transferred has frequent interactions with block builders BuilderNet and Titan Build.

data.title: U.S. President Trump Downplays Duration of Iran Conflict
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump minimized the length of the ongoing conflict with Iran during a campaign event, comparing it to previous prolonged U.S. engagements. "It's only been two months, I mean, a full two months. Other wars lasted 18 years, 4 years," Trump stated. "You know what? We will achieve victory soon." According to Jin10, despite gasoline prices in Las Vegas reaching approximately $5 per gallon during his speech, Trump praised his "economic achievements." He remarked, "Although we've slightly deviated from our path, turning towards beautiful Iran—a beautiful place—we had to do it, or else bad things might have happened." Trump also labeled the inflation rise as "false," attributing it to increased fuel prices, and expressed confidence that fuel prices would return to pre-conflict levels.

data.title: Tether Freezes USDT Linked to Rhea Finance Hack
data.description: Tether has taken action to freeze 3.29 million USDT linked to a hack involving Rhea Finance. According to Foresight News, Tether's CEO Paolo Ardoino announced the move on social media, highlighting the company's efforts to combat illicit activities in the cryptocurrency space. This decision underscores Tether's commitment to maintaining the integrity of its digital currency operations.

data.title: Iran Issues Stern Warning to Ships in Mandeb Strait Amid Rising Tensions
data.description:
On April 17, the Iranian Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps announced on social media that a Resistance Front commander has issued an unprecedented warning to all commercial and military vessels in the Mandeb Strait. According to BlockBeats, the warning states that starting from noon tomorrow, anyone intending to pass through the strait must exercise heightened caution.

The announcement indicates that the situation in the Mandeb Strait is entering a new phase of military tension.

data.title: Tether has frozen 3.29 million USDT in the Rhea Finance hacker's address.
data.description: Tether CEO Paolo Ardoino posted on X that Tether has frozen 3.29 million USDT in the Rhea Finance hacker's address. Ardoino specifically mentioned that "Tether takes this matter seriously," seemingly implying that Circle has failed to restrict hackers from using USDC to transfer illicit funds in recent incidents such as Drift.

data.title: Hong Kong Stocks Open Lower; Tech Companies Surge on Debut
data.description: Hong Kong's stock market opened with declines today, as the Hang Seng Index fell by 0.69% and the Hang Seng Tech Index dropped by 0.72%. According to Jin10, two tech companies made significant gains on their first day of trading. Qunhe Technology (00068.HK) surged by 171.65%, while Changguang Chenxin (03277.HK) rose by 80.54%.
